title: Cuneiform Tablet #0946: Early Dynastic Astronomical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Astronomical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records astronomical matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
